title: New Clouds Wrapping Fix
description: The new cloud texture doesn't wrap, leaving jarring edges where the texture ends. This resource pack fixes that.
body:
The new cloud texture has jarring cuts where the clouds.png texture ends. You can find this edge about 1000 blocks in the negative X direction of spawn when entering a world.

This resource pack makes the transition much smoother.

# Before
![The clouds without this resource pack, with a jarring seam.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18d639dfa78372b8ef2675e1416b818c511776cc_0.webp)

# After
![The clouds using this resource pack, with a much smoother seam.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2082a0803a18d21d949b2b54fefe876d9603394b_0.webp)
